title: End of Year Quiz 2025
description: A quiz covering world news, culture, sport, science, and internet trends from the year 2025.

rounds.title: Headline News 2025
rounds.description: Major and minor news stories that shaped 2025.

questions.text: Which country hosted the G20 Summit in 2025?
Which major climate agreement milestone was scheduled for review in 2025?

Which global health organisation declared the end of a multi-year outbreak in 2025?
How many satellites were reportedly affected by the geomagnetic storm in 2025?
True or false: A major world leader resigned unexpectedly halfway through 2025.
